---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or defect in the product
title: '[BUG]: '
labels: 'bug'
assignees: ''

---

## Bug Summary
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is -->

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
<!-- What should have happened instead? -->

## Actual Behavior
<!-- What actually happened (error messages, wrong output, crash)? -->

## Severity
- [ ] Critical (breaks core functionality)
- [ ] Major (affects important feature, workaround exists)
- [ ] Minor (cosmetic or low-impact issue)

## Environment
- **Browser / OS:** (e.g., Chrome 120, Windows 11)
- **Version:** (e.g., v1.0.0 or commit hash)

## Screenshots / Logs
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or error logs to help explain the problem -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Any other relevant information -->
